calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jackson Zhou, for and with Vrushali Vivek Paunikar, Petitioner.

The subject matter is called. The court advises that it has read the papers and is satisfied. Therefore, the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is granted, and the order thereon is executed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
